creator: y7v81xhon@mozmail.com
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #2)
Hello and thanks for your response.
This was happening in FreeBSD 13.0-STABLE #2 stable/13-n247316-5f4ba94eb59 , but, after an update yesterday to the latest STABLE, I can no longer reproduce. I can just assume it was a temporary bug with my old checkout. 
After testing the same procedure today, it works well.
